species.citation: (L.) Pers. , Syn. Pl. (Pers.) 1 (1805) 400 ; Merr., Fl. Manila (1912) 70; Merrill, EPFP 1 (1923) 27; Hartog, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 5 (1957) 398; ≡ Stratiotes alismoides L. , Sp. Pl., 1st Ed. (1753) 535. = Damasonium lancifolium C.Presl , Reliq. Haenk. 1 (1827) 89.
species.distribution: Africa, Australia, China, India, Japan, Philippines, Solomon Isls. LUZON: Bataan, Bulacan, Cagayan, Camarines Sur (photos), Ifugao, Ilocos Norte, NCR, Pangasinan, Quezon, Rizal, Sorsogon, MINDANAO: Agusan del Norte (photos), Lanao del Norte (photos), Lanao del Sur, MINDORO.
species.notes: Widely distributed from NE Africa and common in SE Asia, extending from India eastwards to China and Japan, southward throughout Malesia to tropical Australia and the Solomon Isls. 0-700(-1000)m.

species.citation: R.Br. , Prodr. Fl. Nov. Holland. (1810) 345. = ?Vallisneria gigantea Graebn. , Bot. Jahrb. Syst. 49 (1912) 68 ; Merr., Fl. Manila (1912) 69; Merrill, EPFP 1 (1923) 26; Hartog, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 5 (1957) 388; Les et al., Syst. Bot. 33 (2008) 62; Type: from New Guinea. ≠ Vallisneria natans auct. non (Lour.) H.Hara ; Steenis, Addenda, Corrigenda et emendanda, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 7 (1974) 828.
species.distribution: Australia, Cambodia, New Caledonia, New Guinea, Philippines. LUZON: Laguna, MINDANAO: Lanao del Norte (photos), MINDORO.
species.notes: Note by P.B. Pelser (10-Apr-2022): Distribution as per Plants of the World Online, but there appears to be some confusion around the delimitation of Vallisneria species, including in the Philippines. See also the use of the names Vallisneria spiralis L. var. denseserrulata Makino and Vallisneria americana Michx. var. americana for Philippine plants by Lowden (1982). 0-300m.
